# Proposal: <title>

Status: Draft
Owner: <owner>
Created: <yyyy-mm-dd>
Linked spec: <path-or-none>
Linked ADR: <path-or-none>
Linked plan: <path-or-none>
Support-tier impact: <none|surface and intended tier change>
Policy impact: <none|ledger or rule affected>

## Why this work exists

Describe the user, repo, review, or operational problem that makes this work
necessary.

## Current behavior

Describe the relevant current state and cite existing files, commands, or
artifacts when available.

## Proposed direction

Describe the intended direction without prescribing every PR-sized step.

## Alternatives considered

List credible alternatives and why they are not preferred.

## Required evidence

List the proof commands, fixtures, artifacts, or review evidence needed before
claims can change.

## Non-goals

List what this proposal intentionally does not cover.

## Claim boundary

State what may be claimed if this proposal is accepted and what may not be
claimed yet.

## Rollback or exit path

Describe how to abandon, supersede, or roll back this direction.
